basic_details.job_title: FCI Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Food Corporation of India (FCI) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 06-04-2026 for 1 post of Company Secretary (CS) cum Compliance Officer. Candidates with Graduate qualification and relevant experience can apply through Offline mode. The application process for FCI Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 has started, and the last date to submit the application form is 20-05-2026. Interested candidates must send their duly filled application form to the official address through the FCI website, fci.gov.in.

qualification.details: Company Secretary (CS) cum Compliance Officer: Graduate from a recognized University; Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) with valid membership; Minimum 15 years total experience (Minimum 10 years post-qualification as Company Secretary in Govt./PSU/Commercial Bank/Financial Institution or reputed Corporate).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application and documents Personal Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for FCI Company Secretary (CS) cum Compliance Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://fci.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FCI CS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer position at the Food Corporation of India is 25 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the CS post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the post of Company Secretary (CS) cum Compliance Officer at the Food Corporation of India as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Company Secretary position at FCI is 62 years. Ensure you meet this age criteria before submitting your application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the FCI CS post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Company Secretary cum Compliance Officer position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 1,50,000/- as per the contractual terms mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the FCI Company Secretary recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates must download the form, fill it, and send it to the specified address via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate from a recognized University and a member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) with a valid membership number to be eligible.

faq.question: Q7. How much experience is required for this role?
faq.answer: Applicants must have a minimum of 15 years of total experience in a Government, PSU, Commercial Bank, Financial Institution, or reputed corporate entity, including 10 years post-qualification as a Company Secretary.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category, including General, OBC, SC, or ST candidates. The application process is free of cost for all eligible applicants.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for FCI CS?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their application and submitted documents, followed by a personal interview and final document verification process.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the official notification?
faq.answer: You can download the official notification from the official website of the Food Corporation of India at https://fci.gov.in/ or refer to the links provided in this article.
